services.title: Spring Repair
services.short: Snapped or worn torsion/extension springs replaced safely, often same-day.
services.priceHint: Most spring jobs are completed in a single visit.
intro: A broken spring is the most common reason a garage door suddenly stops working — and one of the most dangerous to fix yourself. Springs are under extreme tension, and a single snapped coil can leave a heavy door stuck shut (or worse, drop unexpectedly).

Ryan Garage Door replaces torsion and extension springs with correctly-rated, durable hardware matched to your exact door weight. We carry common sizes on the truck, so most repairs are finished the same day you call.
benefits: Torsion & extension springs for residential doors
Springs matched to your door’s weight and cycle rating
Safe tension-release and torque-rated tools — no shortcuts
Balance and safety cycle-test after every replacement
Honest diagnosis — we won’t upsell parts you don’t need

signs.heading: Signs your spring needs attention
items: A loud “bang” from the garage (a spring snapping)
The door won’t open, or only opens a few inches
A visible gap or separation in the spring coil
The door feels extremely heavy or slams shut
The opener strains, reverses, or struggles to lift

faqs.q: How long does a spring repair take?
faqs.a: Most single- or double-spring replacements are completed in under an hour once we’re on site, and we carry common sizes with us so it’s usually same-day.

faqs.q: Should I keep using the door with a broken spring?
faqs.a: No — operating a door with a broken spring puts dangerous strain on the opener and cables and can be unsafe. Stop using it and call us.

services.title: Opener Repair
services.short: Unresponsive remotes, dead motors, bad sensors — diagnosed and fixed fast.
services.priceHint: We service and install LiftMaster, Chamberlain & Genie openers.
intro: A garage door opener that won’t respond can lock you out of your own home. We diagnose the real cause — remote, logic board, motor, gear, or safety sensors — instead of just replacing parts and hoping.

When it’s time for a new unit, we install belt- and chain-drive openers from LiftMaster, Chamberlain and Genie, including quiet belt-drive upgrades and Wi-Fi / smartphone-app smart openers you can control from anywhere.
benefits: Repair of remotes, keypads, logic boards, gears & motors
New opener installation — belt & chain drive

signs.heading: Signs your opener needs service
items: The door reverses before it closes (sensor issue)
The remote or keypad works intermittently
Grinding or buzzing with no movement
The motor runs but the door doesn’t move
Your opener is 10–15+ years old and loud

faqs.q: Can you set up a Wi-Fi / app opener?
faqs.a: Yes — we install and configure smart openers so you can open, close and monitor your door from your phone, and we’ll program your car’s built-in button too.
We service all major residential brands and stock LiftMaster, Chamberlain and Genie for replacements.

services.title: Cable Repair
services.short: Frayed, snapped, or off-track cables restored with reinforced hardware.
intro: Garage door cables carry the full weight of your door alongside the springs. When a cable frays, snaps, or jumps off the drum, the door can hang crooked, get stuck, or come down hard — a real safety hazard.
We replace damaged cables with durable, correctly-sized hardware and re-seat them precisely so your door lifts and lowers smoothly and safely again.
benefits: Full balance test before we leave

signs.heading: Signs of a cable problem
items: The door is crooked or hangs lower on one side
A cable is visibly frayed, loose, or hanging
The door sticks or grinds against the track

services.title: Roller Replacement
services.short: Worn, noisy rollers swapped for quiet, long-lasting nylon rollers.
intro: Worn rollers are the number-one cause of a loud, jerky garage door. Over years of cycles, metal rollers wear flat and bearings seize, making the door grind, bind, and strain the opener.
We replace tired rollers with smooth, quiet nylon rollers on reinforced brackets — an inexpensive upgrade that instantly quiets the door and extends the life of the whole system.
benefits: Less strain on your opener and springs

services.title: New Door Installation
services.short: Professional new-door installs — precise measurement to final safety test.
intro: A new garage door is one of the highest-return upgrades you can make to a home — it transforms curb appeal, improves insulation, and tightens security. But a great door is only as good as its installation.
We handle the whole job: accurate measurement, removal of the old door, precise mounting and balancing of the new system, opener integration, and a full safety test before we hand it back to you.
benefits: Wide selection of styles, colors & materials
Full safety and balance test on completion

services.title: Door Replacement
services.short: Upgrade an old or damaged door — better looks, insulation & security.
services.priceHint: Financing available — pay over time, not all at once.
intro: A worn-out or damaged garage door drags down your home’s appearance and leaves it less secure and less energy-efficient. Replacing it is a fast, dramatic upgrade.
We help you choose the right door for your home and budget — comparing steel, composite and aluminum, insulation levels, and styles — then install it cleanly and haul away the old one.
benefits: Boost curb appeal and home value
Honest help choosing the right door

services.title: Maintenance & Tune-Up
services.short: Catch small problems early — lubrication, balance & a full safety check.
services.priceHint: Ask about our Worry-Free maintenance plan.
intro: Most garage door breakdowns happen at the worst possible time — and most are preventable. A regular tune-up catches small problems before they become expensive emergencies.

Our multi-point service lubricates moving parts, checks spring balance and cable wear, inspects rollers and weather seals, tightens hardware, and tests the auto-reverse safety features — keeping your door safe and quiet year-round.
benefits: Extends the life of the whole system

services.title: Keyless Entry & Smart Openers
services.short: Keypads and Wi-Fi smart openers — open your garage from your phone.
intro: Ditch the spare key under the mat. A keypad lets family and trusted visitors in with a code, and a Wi-Fi smart opener lets you open, close, and check your garage door from anywhere on your phone.
We install and program keyless entry pads and app-controlled smart openers, set up secure codes, and make sure everything is compatible with your existing system.
